description: Unsafe file upload with user-controlled filename used in move_uploaded_file

expected.notes: $_FILES['upload']['name'] flows into file path without sanitization
uploaded filename concatenated into $target and echoed — XSS via tainted filename in response
$_FILES['upload']['tmp_name'] flows into move_uploaded_file path arg; tmp_name is PHP-generated (not user-controlled) but scanner treats $_FILES broadly as tainted — aspirationally suppressible
